Petition To Establish Trust, Remove Trustee, And For Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-13-2013 Continued To Dec-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on December 11, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition to Establish Trust, Remove Trustee and for Accounting was also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition To Establish Trust, Remove Trustee, And For Accounting
Off Calendar Jan-30-2013 Continued To Feb-27-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Timothy Chambers for Mirna Pearlman. Roger Meredith for Janina Dowling.

Counsel agreed to a continuance stating that they have a settlement agreement drafted, that they had a glitch, that they are back on track, that they are getting signatures and that they anticipate getting a dismissal filed. The Petition to Establish Trust, Remove Trustee and For Accounting was continued to February 27, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Henry.

Petition To Establish Trust, Remove Trustee, And For Accounting
Off Calendar Jan-02-2013 Continued To Jan-30-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Meredith for and with Janina Dowling. Timothy Chambers for Mirna Pearlman (Respondent/Trustee).

Mr. Blair was not present. Counsel reported that Mr. Chambers' proposal is that his Client will buyout the property, that Mr. Blair wants an appraisal and that they are close to an agreement. The Petition to Establish Trust, Remove Trustee, etc. was continued to January 31, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the matter is not resolved by then, all Parties are to be be present, are to have met and confered and consider mediation.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
